creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-05-09 07:52:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/vacuum-im     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Vacuum IM - modular, crossplatform Jabber client
  The core program is just a plugin loader - all functionality is made available
  via plugins. This enforces modularity and ensures well defined component
  interaction via interfaces.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/vacuum-im/
  
  PR:             ports/143498
  Submitted by:   Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin at googlemail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.130     +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/net-im/vacuum-im/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/vacuum-im/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +780 -0    ports/net-im/vacuum-im/pkg-plist (new)
